headless.title: India's Stock Market in 2026: Sensex, Nifty Outlook and Investment Strategy | SwapXTimes
headless.content_preview:
# India's Stock Market in 2026: Sensex, Nifty Outlook and Investment Strategy | SwapXTimes

Indian Markets: A Year of Correction and Consolidation After the extraordinary bull run that saw the BSE Sensex cross 85,000 and the NSE Nifty 50 breach 26,000 in September 2024, Indian equity markets entered a significant correction phase in the October 2024 - February 2025 period. Driven by persistent Foreign Institutional Investor (FII) selling (net outflows of approximately ₹2.1 lakh crore in Q4 2024)
